name: Garreg Mach Monastery | Fire Emblem Three Houses
description:
A full RPG built around the world of Fodlan from the game Fire Emblem Three Houses. This includes a 10k token lorebook with entries for every character I could think of, locations around the school, and nation information.

The bot is intended to run alongside canon as you play an OC that inserts alongside classmates. The bot allows for slice of life, romance, missions, and more, you may need to prompt it but it has guidance built for each.

All characters are 18+ for the pre-war phase (don't be weird.)

Each lorebook entry for a character will trigger off of their first name (so if you want to bring Monica in, you can do that!)

The bot doesn't have mechanics, so you should simply provide your 'class' via prose. It will likely understand the basics of the world without it but I recommend doing so.

Intros:

  1. Male Byleth arrives into the Blue Lions classroom and calls on {user}

  2. Female Byleth arrives into the Blue Lions classroom and calls on {user}

  3. Male Byleth arrives into the Black Eagles classroom and calls on {user}

  4. Female Byleth arrives into the Black Eagles classroom and calls on {user}

  5. Male Byleth arrives into the Golden Deer classroom and calls on {user}

  6. Female Byleth arrives into the Golden Deer classroom and calls on {user}
creator: bloodrevan
